title: Australian Pork Back Ribs Stir Fry
description: A twist on traditional stir fry, using tender Australian pork back ribs and a variety of crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Season the pork back ribs with salt and black pepper.
Roast the ribs in the oven for 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
In a large skillet, heat the stir fry oil over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger, and stir fry for 1 minute.
Add the crunchy vegetables, and stir fry for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the roasted pork back ribs, and stir fry for 2-3 minutes, or until coated in the vegetable mixture.
Pour in the sour sauce and soy sauce, and stir fry for a further minute.
Serve the Australian pork back ribs stir fry hot, garnished with additional crunchy vegetables if desired.
